name: Design Workflow
description: Collaboratively produce a design document for a new or changed component (orchestrator, skill, or agent) before any issues are written. Gather intent → draft design doc → iterate until approved → commit on design/{slug} branch and open PR.

gateConfig.prompt: The design document draft is shown above. Review it and choose an action. You may also edit docs/designs/{slug}.md directly — the agent will re-read and confirm alignment on the next Revise loop.

choices.label: Approve — design is ready, open PR
